data.title: ONE Gas First Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on April 7, 2026, ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) announced that it will disclose its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after markets close on May 4, 2026. The company's executive management is scheduled to engage in a conference call on May 5, 2026.

data.title: PROG Holdings, Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: PROG Holdings, Inc. is set to disclose financial performance for Q1 2026 on April 29, 2026 before the market opens. The fintech holding company for Progressive Leasing, Four Technologies, MoneyApp, and Purchasing Power, trading under NYSE:PRG, will conduct a live webcast on the same day at 8:30 A.M. ET to review these results. For interested parties, access to the webcast is available through the provided link.

data.title: GreenSTEM Technology Corp Technology Ready for Field-Testing
data.description: In SASKATOON, Saskatchewan, GreenSTEM Technology Corp has unveiled BioProspector™ Fertilizer (BioPro), a novel product harnessing biosafe fungi to enhance plant resilience to abiotic stressors like drought, extreme temperatures, salinity, or nutrient inadequacies, particularly beneficial for challenging environments like mine sites. BioPro is now open for field trials, with GreenSTEM seeking participants to join. Co-founder Susan Kaminskyj emphasizes, "Our primary objective is to revolutionize plant growth by integrating eco-friendly solutions."

data.title: SM Energy Schedules First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, SM Energy Company (NYSE: SM) revealed its intention to disclose financial and operational data for the first quarter of 2026 post-market closure on May 6, 2026. The company has scheduled a conference call to review the results on May 7, 2026.

data.title: Excelerate Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Date
data.description: Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) based in The Woodlands, Texas, is scheduled to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, after U.S. financial markets close. The earnings release and presentation will be accessible on the investor section of the company's website at www.excelerateenergy.com. On May 7, 2026, the company's management will conduct a conference call for analysts and investors.

data.title: PSQ Holdings Announces Finance Leadership Transition
data.description: PSQ Holdings, Inc. revealed today that their Chief Financial Officer, James Rinn, has decided to resign from his position, effective April 30, 2026, in order to pursue a different opportunity. Despite stepping down as CFO, Mr. Rinn will continue to be a Class III Director at the company. Taking over the role of Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer starting May 1, 2026, is Michael Pena, who currently serves as the Senior Vice President of Finance for the Company.

data.title: American Healthcare REIT Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: A company based in Irvine, California, revealed plans to release their Q1 2026 earnings report on May 7, 2026, after trading hours. American Healthcare REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AHR) will host a public conference call alongside a webcast to discuss these earnings further.

data.title: AVITA Medical Showcases Acute Burn and Wound Care Portfolio at ABA 2026, Featuring New Cohealyx Data
data.description: AVITA Medical looks forward to presenting the latest data on Cohealyx at the upcoming ABA 2026. The data showcases significant advancements in wound healing and enhancing patient recovery outcomes through real-world evidence. This presentation will focus on the positive impact of Cohealyx in medical settings, emphasizing its effectiveness in improving patient outcomes. Attendees can anticipate learning about the notable improvements in wound healing and patient recovery made possible by Cohealyx. This presentation will provide valuable insights into the role of Cohealyx in enhancing healthcare practices.

data.title: MasterBrand to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5
data.description: MasterBrand, Inc. (NYSE: MBC), the leading residential cabinet manufacturer in North America, is scheduled to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5. The company will release the figures after market closure and will host a live conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the financial results and future prospects. For those interested, the telephone access number for the live call is (877) 407-4019 (U.S.).

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 07.04.2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp based in Helsinki, Finland, announced changes in its own shares. The company (LEI: 529900ODI3047E2LIV03) confirmed the completion of repurchases of its own shares (ISIN: FI4000297767) at 22:30 EET on the same day. This update was released on the stock exchange.

data.title: Nintedanib Capsules Approval and Launch
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, on April 7, 2026, Dexcel Pharma USA has achieved a significant milestone by obtaining final approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Nintedanib Capsules. These capsules are available in two strengths: 100 mg and 150 mg. This approval allows Dexcel Pharma USA to market and distribute the generic equivalent of this medication, providing more affordable options for patients.

data.title: Bitcoin faces support break as Trump threatens to obliterate Iran, impacting markets. Cryptocurrency prices are volatile.
data.description: President Trump has made a dire threat to obliterate an entire civilization by tonight, causing significant concern in the markets. This development has led to increased volatility in various markets, including Bitcoin, with investors on edge due to the uncertainty surrounding the situation. The possibility of such dramatic action has had a notable impact on market sentiment, with many closely monitoring the unfolding events.
